name: New Customer Onboarding - Standard
description: Standard onboarding playbook for Quickstart/Standard implementation packages. Run by the Implementation Managers team after Closed Won.

tasks.subject: Onboarding kickoff call with customer
tasks.comments: Introduce the implementation team, confirm goals, success criteria, and timeline.

tasks.subject: Provision core platform access
tasks.comments: Create org/users and grant the purchased entitlements.

tasks.subject: Configure standard workflows
tasks.comments: Apply the standard Northstar configuration baseline.

tasks.subject: 30-day adoption check-in
tasks.comments: Confirm adoption, resolve blockers, capture expansion signals.

name: New Customer Onboarding - Enterprise
description: Enterprise onboarding playbook for the Enterprise implementation package. White-glove engagement led by Implementation Managers with a named TAM/CSM.

tasks.subject: Executive kickoff & success plan
tasks.comments: Align executive sponsors on the mutual success plan.

tasks.subject: Assign named TAM & CSM
tasks.comments: Staff the account with a Technical Account Manager and Customer Success Manager.

tasks.subject: Provision enterprise platform + SSO
tasks.comments: Stand up the enterprise tenant and wire up SSO/identity.

tasks.subject: Custom workflow design workshop
tasks.comments: Run the design workshop and capture the configuration backlog.

tasks.subject: Administrator training session
tasks.comments: Train the customer's admins on day-2 operations.

tasks.subject: 30-day executive business review
tasks.comments: Review outcomes against the success plan with the sponsors.

name: Implementation Services Kickoff
description: Project-services kickoff for Custom Statement of Work engagements. Owned by Implementation Managers.

tasks.subject: SOW review & scope confirmation
tasks.comments: Walk the signed SOW and confirm scope, assumptions, and exclusions.

tasks.subject: Build project plan & milestones
tasks.comments: Produce the project plan with milestone dates and owners.

tasks.subject: Data migration plan
tasks.comments: Define source systems, mapping, and migration approach.

tasks.subject: Go-live readiness review
tasks.comments: Confirm cutover readiness and sign-off criteria.

name: Premium Support Activation
description: Activates Premium Support entitlements and introduces SLAs. Owned by Customer Success.

tasks.subject: Activate premium support entitlements
tasks.comments: Turn on the purchased support tier and entitlements.

tasks.subject: Introduce support contacts & SLAs
tasks.comments: Send the support contacts, escalation paths, and SLA summary.

tasks.subject: Schedule quarterly business review
tasks.comments: Book the recurring QBR cadence.

name: Renewal Save Plan
description: Retention playbook for at-risk renewals. Owned by Customer Success Managers.

tasks.subject: Assess renewal risk & usage
tasks.comments: Review health score, usage trend, and open issues.

tasks.subject: Executive sponsor outreach
tasks.comments: Re-engage the executive sponsor on value delivered.

tasks.subject: Build retention offer
tasks.comments: Construct the renewal offer / incentive with Deal Desk.

tasks.subject: Renewal proposal review
tasks.comments: Present the renewal proposal to the customer.

name: At-Risk Customer Escalation
description: Escalation playbook triggered when a provisioning exception Case is raised. Owned by Customer Success.

tasks.subject: Triage provisioning/health exception
tasks.comments: Assess the failing provisioning step and customer impact.

tasks.subject: Customer escalation call
tasks.comments: Acknowledge the issue and set expectations with the customer.

tasks.subject: Remediation plan & owner
tasks.comments: Document the fix, owner, and target date.

tasks.subject: Follow-up & confirm resolution
tasks.comments: Verify the issue is resolved and the customer is satisfied.
